title: narcissus papyraceus var. albulus
intro: Narcissus papyraceus var. albulus is a variant of the paperwhite narcissus, a perennial bulbous plant with white and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Narcissus papyraceus var. albulus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds and respiratory issues.
